title: nf-core/scrnaseq pipeline - params.cellranger_multi_barcodes schema
description: Schema for the file provided with params.cellranger_multi_barcodes

sample.errorMessage: Sample name must be provided and cannot contain spaces

multiplexed_sample_id.errorMessage: Multiplexed sample ID must be provided and cannot contain spaces

cmo_ids.errorMessage: CMO IDs may only contain alphanumeric, underscore, hyphen, and pipe characters

ocm_ids.errorMessage: OCM IDs must be OB1, OB2, OB3, or OB4 (or pipe-separated combinations)
